candidate_sources.availability: Free direct XLSX download — confirmed for 2010–2021
candidate_sources.license: Public access; terms not explicitly stated; research use common
candidate_sources.expected_effort: LOW — direct XLSX download if 2024 were available
candidate_sources.notes: Archive page explicitly states: 'MLB scores and odds archive will not be updated.' Last available season confirmed: 2021. Direct XLSX download links confirmed for 2010–2021 seasons. No 2022, 2023, or 2024 data present. This source cannot resolve the 2024 closing-line data gap.

candidate_sources.source_type: Web odds aggregator — historical results with closing odds
candidate_sources.availability: Web UI only — no bulk CSV download. JavaScript-rendered pagination (~50 games/page).
candidate_sources.cost: free to view; no subscription required
candidate_sources.license: ToS restricts automated extraction (Section 5). Manual viewing permitted. Scraping requires explicit ToS review.
candidate_sources.market_coverage: MLB regular season + postseason — 2024 confirmed. World Series Game 1 (LAD vs NYY) odds visible: 1.71 / 2.37.
candidate_sources.expected_effort: HIGH — ~2430 rows spread across ~49 paginated pages. Requires JS-rendered headless browser (Playwright/Selenium). ToS review mandatory before scraping.
candidate_sources.notes: 2024 MLB data confirmed visible in web UI. Odds shown in decimal format; convertible to American ML via standard formula. Site shows: LAD 1.71 / NYY 2.37 for WS Game 1 (Oct 25 2024). Bulk scraping not trivially available — no public API, no CSV export. Pagination structure and schema need probe before committing to scrape. Risk: ToS Section 5 restricts automated extraction; anti-scraping measures possible.

candidate_sources.source_name: Kaggle — Sports Betting Predictive Analysis Dataset (pratyushpuri)
candidate_sources.market_coverage: Multi-sport: Football, Basketball, Tennis, Baseball, Hockey
candidate_sources.notes: Dataset is explicitly labelled 'Synthetic (generated using Faker library)' in the Kaggle dataset card. Not real market data. 1,369 rows total across 5 sports; estimated ~274 baseball rows but team names are fictitious (city-based convention, not real MLB franchises). Cannot be used for market-edge validation. Confirmed disqualified.

candidate_sources.source_type: Kaggle community dataset — Retrosheet game logs
candidate_sources.odds_type: none — game log / box score only
candidate_sources.expected_effort: LOW to download; ZERO odds value
candidate_sources.notes: 162 columns of game performance statistics only (Retrosheet-derived). No moneyline odds, no spread, no totals. Source: retrosheet.org/gamelogs/ (publicly confirmed). Does have correct join keys (Date, Away, Home) and 2024 coverage, but cannot fill the 2024 odds gap.

candidate_sources.source_name: Kaggle — MLB 2024 dataset collection (all search results)
candidate_sources.market_coverage: Game performance and team stats — NO betting odds across any dataset
candidate_sources.expected_effort: N/A — no odds data in any of the 27 datasets
candidate_sources.notes: Exhaustive Kaggle search with 4 separate queries: 'MLB odds 2024 moneyline', 'mlb odds baseball betting', 'baseball odds betting', 'mlb baseball 2024'. Total 27 datasets returned. Titles include: MLB Bat Tracking, WBC 2026 Scouting, MLB Postseason Pitch-by-Pitch, Baseball Savant Leaderboards, Lahman Baseball Database, MLB Hitting Data, MLB Team Payrolls, MLB Player Salaries. None contain betting odds or moneyline data. No 2024 MLB closing-line dataset exists on Kaggle as of 2026-05-26.

candidate_sources.source_name: GitHub — MLB betting odds repositories (all search results)
candidate_sources.notes: Searched GitHub with 3 queries: 'mlb odds 2024 moneyline csv' (0 repos), 'mlb baseball odds 2024 csv' (0 repos), 'mlb betting odds historical 2024' (0 repos). GitHub topic 'mlb-betting' has been used on 0 public repositories (topic page confirmed). No community-maintained 2024 MLB odds dataset found on GitHub as of 2026-05-26.

Cannot confirm: 2024 availability, field coverage, download format, or license. Requires manual access investigation. Classified as SOURCE_LICENSE_UNCLEAR due to inaccessibility during search.

recommendation_rationale: OddsPortal.com has 2024 MLB closing-line odds confirmed visible in the web UI. Decimal odds for individual games are accessible. P68 should: (1) review OddsPortal ToS Section 5 in detail, (2) probe pagination structure for a single month, (3) estimate total row count for the full 2024 MLB regular season, (4) confirm Home/Away team field alignment with target schema. If P68 confirms feasibility and ToS compliance, proceed with structured scrape. If blocked by ToS: escalate to P61 PATH_A (CEO decision for The Odds API paid pull).

p61_context.p61_path_b_target: Kaggle/GitHub community dataset search — confirmed exhausted with no result
p61_context.p61_path_b_expansion: P67 additionally searched SBRO archive (stopped 2021), OddsPortal.com (has 2024 web UI data, no bulk CSV), aussportsbetting.com (HTTP 403 blocked)
